symbols.vision_description: Three circles arranged in a triangular pattern connected by lines, each containing a number: 186 (top-left), 209 (top-right), and 127 (bottom-center). Forms a closed triangular graph/network diagram.
A curved arc/line segment, part of a larger circular diagram with numbered nodes (74, 207, 25, 11, 166) connected by arcs.
The number '125' printed in standard Latin/Arabic numerals, positioned in the center-left of the image on a curved arc line.
Fragment of a graph/network diagram showing circular nodes with numbers (201, 13, 150, 184, 185, 197) connected by curved black lines

A graph diagram showing circular nodes containing numbers (41, 175, 144, and a partial 1) connected by curved black edges. The node labeled '175' is at the top-center, '41' is at the top-left, '144' is at the bottom-left, and a partial node '1' is on the right edge.
A graph diagram showing four circular nodes labeled 129, 163, 6, and 164, connected by curved black lines (edges). This is a network/graph visualization, not a single character glyph.
Partial view of a hierarchical tree or graph diagram showing several circular nodes containing numbers (197, 138, 18, 39, 102) connected by curved black lines
A circular node containing the printed number '161', connected by lines to surrounding nodes in a network graph

A cropped portion of a node-link diagram showing several circles connected by curved lines. The circles contain numeric labels: 209 (top), 120 (top right), 27 (middle left), 204 (bottom). Black curved arcs connect the nodes across the crop.

Crop of a small network/graph diagram showing four circular nodes connected by curved lines, each containing a three-digit number: 149 (top-left), 172 (top-right), 186 (bottom-left), 209 (bottom-right). The circles have hand-drawn appearance with thick black outlines.
The number '186' printed in a serif font inside a circle, part of a network/node graph diagram with other numbered circles (95, 158, 12) connected by curved lines.
Cropped section of a network/graph diagram showing numbered circular nodes (201, 134, 17, 150, 84, 1) connected by curved black lines on a white background.
A portion of a graph/network diagram showing circular nodes labeled with numbers (126, 171, 16, 67, 178) connected by curved edges
A diagram fragment showing curved parallel lines with circular nodes containing numbers (126, 17, 04, 157, 178) at their endpoints, resembling a network or flow chart.
Multiple circles containing numbers (191, 130, 141, and a partial 1) connected by curved lines, forming a graph or network diagram
A graph diagram fragment showing four circular nodes labeled 196, 162, 149, and 172, connected by curved edges in a roughly rectangular arrangement.
Partial view of a node-link diagram showing circular nodes labeled with numbers (37, 195, 205, 176, 15) connected by curved black lines.
A graph diagram showing multiple circular nodes labeled with numbers (203, 122, 9, 167) connected by black lines, forming a network structure.
Three-digit number '138' printed in black inside a circle at the top of a graph/network diagram with other numbered nodes (185, 92, 145) connected by curved lines.
Number '208' printed in black sans-serif font inside a circular node, part of a network/graph diagram with other numbered circular nodes connected by edges.
A network graph diagram showing four circular nodes labeled with numbers (135, 123, 96, 163) connected by curved lines, forming a graph structure.
Partial view of a network graph with circular nodes containing numbers (129, 60, 168, 213) connected by curved black lines
A circular graph node containing the number '205' at the bottom of a network/graph diagram, connected by edges to partial circles showing '48', '137', and '17'.
A network graph diagram with multiple circles connected by curved lines, containing the numbers 179, 15, 135, and 50 inside the circles.
A circle containing the number 190, part of a network/graph diagram with other numbered circular nodes (205, 191, 13) connected by lines
A network graph diagram with circles containing the numbers 178, 213, 122, and a partial 03, connected by black lines
Circle containing the number 148, forming a node in a graph/network diagram with lines connecting to other numbered circles (133, 45, 190).
A graph/network diagram showing circular nodes labeled with numbers (159, 126, 210, 171, 12) connected by straight black lines, representing a node-link structure rather than a single glyph.
A network graph diagram showing multiple circles connected by lines, with numbers (133, 62, 123, 20) inside the circular nodes
A fragment of a network/graph diagram showing circular nodes containing numbers (2.10, 12..., 5.71) connected by straight lines, resembling a molecular structure or graph visualization.
The number 196 printed in black inside a circle, part of a network graph with other circled numbers (150, 13, 185) connected by black lines.
A circular node in a graph/network diagram containing the number 153, connected by lines to adjacent nodes (partial numbers 2, 199, 18 visible).
A network graph diagram showing multiple circles connected by black lines, each circle containing a three-digit number (visible: 176, 130, 05, 15).
Part of a node graph diagram showing circles containing numbers (146, 192, 180, 11) connected by black lines

A graph network diagram showing circular nodes containing the numbers 165, 120, 170, and 211, connected by straight line segments. The node '120' is on the left, '165' at top-right, '170' at middle-right, and '211' at bottom-left.
Crop of a graph diagram showing circular nodes containing the numbers 167, 214, 121, and 64, connected by straight lines forming a network structure.

A graph diagram showing four circular nodes connected by lines. The top node contains '131', the bottom node contains '181', the left node shows partial '4' (cut off), and the right node shows partial '20' (cut off). The nodes are connected in a diamond/rhombus pattern with thick black lines.
A graph/network diagram with circles containing the numbers 182, 197, 147, and 138, connected by straight lines forming a node-link structure.
A network of circles containing numbers (166, 143, 193, 14x) connected by straight black lines, forming a graph or node diagram. The most prominent single circle contains '143'.

A hexagonal graph diagram with four circles visible at the vertices containing the numbers 200 (top), 1 (left), 15 (right), and 132 (bottom), connected by thick black lines forming a diamond/hexagon shape. Other numbered circles are partially visible at the edges.
The digits '206' printed in black serif-like font inside a circle at the top of a small network/graph diagram with other numbered circular nodes (5, 13, 156) connected by straight lines.
A circular node containing the number 214, connected by lines to other numbered circular nodes in a graph/network diagram.
A small network/graph diagram showing circles containing the numbers 61, 174, 124, and 207, connected by straight black lines forming a node-link structure.
A graph diagram showing four circles connected by lines in a diamond pattern, containing the numbers 154 (top), 1 (right), 151 (bottom), and 40 (left).
The number 184 printed in Latin serif numerals, enclosed within a thin black circle, with lines connecting to adjacent circular nodes (150, 185, 147) forming a network/graph structure.
Number '194' printed in a serif font inside a circle, forming a node in a network diagram
The glyph '175' rendered in a serif typeface inside a circular node, with adjacent nodes showing '155', '30', and '2' connected by straight line segments forming a graph/network structure.

A cropped fragment of a graph/network diagram showing multiple numbered circles (140, 189, 188, 143) connected by straight black edges. The circles contain black serif/sans-serif digits on a white background, linked in a node-edge pattern typical of a graph or flowchart.
Partial view of a network graph with circular nodes containing the numbers 124, 207, 210, and 125, connected by thick black lines
Cropped portion of a network/graph diagram showing circular nodes containing numbers (198, 83, 137, 149) connected by black line segments forming a lattice-like structure.
